scene_title: Cavaleiro do Apocalipse no cavalo palido
narrative_beat: Armadura branco-osso e carmesim com simbolos de imortalidade artificial

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid Pale Horseman of Apocalypse in bone-white and crimson armor with hollow eyes surrounded by golden artificial immortality symbols code circuits and servers in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the hollow eyes and the golden artificial immortality symbols surrounding the Pale Horseman
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated modern cemetery with grey headstones in background
props: Pale Horseman in bone-white and crimson armor

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, bone-white crimson grading

mood.emotion: Revelation 9:6 — men seek death and death flees — digital immortality

symbolism.primary: the pale horse as the vehicle of artificial immortality
symbolism.secondary: hollow eyes as the cost — what is lost when death is refused

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
